title: Iran’s Hard-Liners Try to Derail Potential Deal With the U.S.
summary_full: A political fight is playing out in Iran, where the small but loud faction of hard-liners has used rallies, state media and private and public statements to try to undermine negotiations.
summary_public: A political fight is playing out in Iran, where the small but loud faction of hard-liners has used rallies, state media and private and public statements to try to undermine negotiations.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s Hard-Liners Try to Derail Potential Deal
